title: The Trust Continuity Bridge
reason: Trust is a core missing bridge variable across love, repair, grief, NPC relationship arcs, and public community design.
boundaryNote: Symbolic relationship-design metaphor only; not relationship therapy or a score of a person.

title: The Loneliness Signal Field
candidateFormula: Lon = (Disconnection × Unseen Need × Time) / (Belonging + Contact + Meaning)
reason: Loneliness is essential for humane storytelling, cozy game arcs, and reflective prompts without shaming isolation.
boundaryNote: Reflection/craft metaphor only; not a diagnosis or substitute for support.

title: The Regret Time Loop
candidateFormula: Reg = (Missed Choice × Consequence × Replay) / (Learning + Repair + Acceptance)
reason: Regret bridges guilt, grief, character development, time-loop stories, and moral learning arcs.
boundaryNote: Use as a repair and learning lens, not self-punishment.

title: The Forgiveness Release Vector
reason: Forgiveness needs careful claim discipline: it belongs with repair and truth, not pressure or bypassing.
boundaryNote: Never use forgiveness language to force reconciliation, excuse harm, or remove boundaries.

title: The Motivation Ignition Curve
reason: Motivation is useful for learning systems, creator tools, productivity arcs, and character growth.
boundaryNote: Not a productivity score; avoid shame-based motivation.

title: The Acceptance Landing Field
candidateFormula: Acc = (Truth Seen × Support × Time) / (Denial + Control Grip)
reason: Acceptance supports grief closure, fear softening, calm, and wise decision arcs.
boundaryNote: Acceptance does not mean approval of harm or giving up needed action.
